name: Beef Soup with Liver Balls
recipeIngredient: Short ribs or chuck with bone, cut into pieces (2 lb)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the meat and place it in a large kettle. Add onions, celery, salt, pepper, and water. Cover and bring to a boil.
2. Skim off any scum that forms on the surface.
3. Reduce heat so the meat just simmers. Cook for 1 ½ hours.
4. Add carrots, tomatoes, and parsley. Continue cooking until the meat is tender (about 1 hour).
5. Meanwhile, prepare the liver balls by combining liver with bread crumbs, flour, eggs, parsley, salt, pepper, marjoram, mace, and garlic. Let stand until the soup is done.
6. Remove the tender meat, bones, and carrots from the soup. Cut the meat and carrots into bite-sized pieces and return them to the soup.
7. Bring the soup back to a boil and drop in the liver balls. Cover and cook for 10 minutes more.
8. Serve hot.
